name: python3-numpy-dev
title: python3-numpy-dev
summary: Python library for numerical computations (Python 3 headers)
description:
Python library for numerical computations (Python 3 headers)
NumPy contains a powerful N-dimensional array object, sophisticated
(broadcasting) functions, tools for integrating C/C++ and Fortran
code, and useful linear algebra, Fourier transform, and random number
capabilities.
.
This package installs the development headers which are needed
to build C/C++ extensions with NumPy for Python 3.

commands.name: dh_numpy3
commands.description: adds Numpy depends to python:Depends substvar

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dh_numpy3 because Python library for numerical computations (Python 3 headers).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dh_numpy3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dh_numpy3 [debhelper options]` as documented upstream for dh_numpy3.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dh_numpy3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dh_numpy3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
